tasks.title: Fix all failing tests across the application
tasks.description:
Audit and fix all existing tests in the application:

1. Run the complete test suite: npx vitest run
2. Identify all failing tests and document the failures
3. For each failure:
   - Investigate the root cause (test code issue vs production code issue)
   - Fix the underlying issue in either the test file or production code
   - Verify the specific test now passes
4. Re-run the full suite to ensure all tests pass
5. Address any skipped tests if present

Test files to check:
- src/sections/Contact.test.jsx
- src/sections/Home.test.jsx
- src/sections/Projects.test.jsx
- src/sections/About.test.jsx
- src/components/Footer.test.jsx
- src/components/Navbar.test.jsx
- src/App.test.jsx (if exists)

Use vitest for running tests. Fix both test code and production code as needed to ensure all tests pass.
acceptance_criteria: Full test suite runs without errors
Test suite completes successfully with 0 failures

tasks.title: Validate all tests pass
tasks.description:
Run the complete test suite to verify all tests pass:

1. Run: npx vitest run
2. Verify all tests pass with 0 failures
3. Check that no tests are skipped
4. Confirm the test suite completes successfully
